$description: macOS 26 Tahoe + Liquid Glass overrides. The generator wraps themeable color tokens in an NSVisualEffectView / SwiftUI .glassEffect() where elevation > surface. User brand color still tints through the material.

omnibar.$description: Omnibar uses Liquid Glass with subtle brand tint. Falls back to .regularMaterial on pre-Tahoe.

accent.$description: Bridge to NSColor.controlAccentColor when user hasn't set a theme. Once user sets brand via browser.theme, we stop following the system accent.

followSystem.$description: 1 if no user theme active; 0 otherwise. Set by runtime.

vibrancy.$description: Vibrancy levels for text on materials. SwiftUI uses .foregroundStyle(.primary/.secondary/.tertiary) which auto-adapt.

dynamicType.$description: macOS respects per-app preferred text size in System Settings > Accessibility > Display. Generator emits .font(.body) etc. rather than fixed pt sizes for themeable type.
